comment: [SLICE M2 — 2026-07-02] Material receipts: the manager-side incident form for a delivery
problem (damaged / short / wrong item / other), per the SOP D.13 duty (inspect, photograph,
flag, notify the CM before signing). Deep-linked from the daily form's 'Expected materials'
section ('Report a problem →' prefills material_description + qty_expected through the R3/R5
openForm values mechanism) AND normally pickable from Submit-a-Form. Catalog category is
'progress' (commercial, not safety) — OPERATOR-VETOABLE, flagged per the M-series spec.
Net-new form (editor-authored posture): source_pdf is empty — no reference PDF exists (the
photo-test-v1 precedent). Photos ride the existing header-level photo pipeline (§34 Mac-side
material_description + issue + details — strict entry, OPERATOR-CONFIRMED 2026-07-03 per

sections.label: Details — what is wrong (condition, counts, packaging list vs received)
Action Taken (flagged on the delivery receipt, Construction Manager notified, etc.)
